title: Hello from the generated Cloud Blog CMS site
excerpt: This post was created by the cloud-blog-cms Skill during site initialization.
contentMarkdown:
# Hello from the generated Cloud Blog CMS site

The Skill provisioned Cloudflare resources, deployed the Worker, wrote site settings, and published this bilingual post through the API.

title.zh: 来自 Skill 生成站点的第一篇文章

excerpt.zh: 这篇文章由 cloud-blog-cms Skill 在初始化流程中创建。

contentMarkdown.zh:
# 来自 Skill 生成站点的第一篇文章

Skill 已创建 Cloudflare 资源、部署 Worker、写入站点设置，并通过 API 发布这篇双语文章。
